# B1 Extended Dataset - N=5000

**Benchmark:** B1 - Entity Fact Retrieval under Degradation Regime
**Created:** 2026-03-21
**Entities:** 5000 (4996 fictional distractors + 2 targets + 2 adversarial distractors)
**Approximate token count:** ~280,000 (estimated at ~56 chars/entity avg * 5000 / 4 chars/token)
**Seed:** random.seed(7)

---

## Ground Truth (Needles)

**researcher/elena_torres** (pos 1000/5000) - affiliation: Vienna Institute for Advanced Computation | publication_count: 83
**researcher/marcus_delacroix** (pos 3750/5000) - affiliation: Université de Montréal MILA | publication_count: 29

## Adversarial Distractors

**researcher/viktor_sokolov** (pos 1010/5000) - publication_count: 83 (same as elena_torres) | affiliation: Technical University of Graz (different)
**researcher/jean_pierre_lambert** (pos 3760/5000) - affiliation: Université de Montréal MILA (same as marcus_delacroix) | publication_count: 61 (different)

---
